lookalikes.prompt: A woman in her late 30s, with warm, deep olive skin and a smattering of faint sun spots across her forehead and temples. Her face is heart-shaped, with high, sculpted cheekbones and a delicate, pointed jawline. Her hair is a rich, dark auburn with subtle highlights, styled in voluminous, loose waves that cascade around her shoulders. Her large, round, dark brown eyes sparkle with amusement, set close together under thick, straight eyebrows. Her nose is long and narrow with a slightly upturned tip, and her thin lips are parted in a joyful smile, revealing a glimpse of teeth. She has a faint scar above her right eyebrow. She is reaching down, playfully throwing a bright red ball for a golden retriever in a sunny backyard. Full-body shot, dynamic pose. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A full-body shot of a woman in her late 30s, of Indian descent, with a playful expression, dark brown skin, and a scattering of small freckles on her nose and cheeks. Her face is heart-shaped, with a gently tapered jawline. She has long, wavy dark brown hair with prominent gray streaks, pulled back into a messy ponytail. Her round, amber eyes are set closer together under straight, medium-thick eyebrows. Her nose is narrow with a slightly upturned tip, and her lips are full with a subtle upward curve.
